name: Text Input UI
summary: Rich text input component with Emacs keybindings for message composition
goals: Provide a feature-rich text input with Emacs-style keybindings

specDetail.description: A RichTextInput component that provides a multiline text area with Emacs keybindings, auto-resize, and markdown preview support. Integrates with the useEmacsKeybindings hook for power-user keyboard shortcuts.

parameters.name: onSubmit
parameters.description: Callback when message is submitted (Enter or Ctrl+Enter)

parameters.name: placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text when input is empty

parameters.name: disabled
parameters.description: Whether the input is disabled during agent processing

constraints: Must support Emacs keybindings (Ctrl+A, Ctrl+E, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+Y, etc.)
Must auto-resize vertically up to a maximum height
Must submit on Enter and insert newline on Shift+Enter (configurable)

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user types a message and presses Enter
acceptanceCriteria.then: the message is submitted and the input is cleared

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
